title: UMAzing textures(umamusume)
description:
In this UMAzing resource pack (umamusume)you will receive a modified: Moon (in the form of Still in Love),Sun(in the form of TM Opera O),Golden and common carrot(in the form of golden carrats) aaand... banana sword?

 

I'll add sounds later, but not now.
body:
In this UMAzing resource pack (umamusume)you will receive a modified: Moon (in the form of Still in Love),Sun(in the form of TM Opera O),Golden and common carrot(in the form of golden carrats) aaand... banana sword?

 

I'll add sounds later, but not now.
